# Architectural Decisions Log

Append-only. When a decision is reversed, *add* a new entry noting the reversal — don't edit the old one. This is history, not state.

---

## 2026-01-10 — Alpha bootstrapping decision

**Decision:** Establish the alpha baseline (D-A-1).

**Rationale:** Something has to be first.

---

## 2026-01-20 — Beta layering decision

**Decision:** Layer beta on alpha (D-A-2). See [the M1 plan](archive/M1/M1.E1-PLAN.md).

---

## 2026-02-05 — Gamma cross-cut decision

**Decision:** Cross-cut gamma across the stack (D-B-1, D-B-2).

**Implication:** Touches everything.

---

## Undatable rolling note

**Decision:** This heading has no ISO date, so it must never evict.

---

## 2026-03-05 — Delta current-milestone decision

**Decision:** Delta is current-milestone work (D-C-1); it stays live.
